data.title: SKB Biopharma Raises HK$1.94 Billion from Share Placement
data.description:
Drug company Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical completed the placing of 5,918,000 shares to at least six investors at HK$331.8 apiece to raise net proceeds of a little over HK$1.94 billion, a Thursday Hong Kong bourse filing said.

Proceeds will be used for the R&D, trials, registration, manufacturing, and commercialization of products; external collaborations; product pipeline portfolio expansion; and replenishment of working capital among other uses.

data.title: REG - BT Group PLC - Annual Financial Report
data.description:
RNS Number : 6046M BT Group PLC 12 June 2025  

12 June 2025

BT GROUP PLC ANNUAL REPORT 2025

BT Group plc announces that its Annual Report 2025 (the Annual Report) and the Notice of meeting 2025 (the Notice) have been published today and are available on its website at bt.com/annualreport

A copy of the Annual Report, Notice and proxy form for the BT Group plc Annual General Meeting 2025 have been submitted to the National Storage Mechanism and will shortly be available for inspection at https://data.fca.org.uk/#/nsm/nationalstoragemechanism

The BT Group plc 2025 Annual General Meeting will be held as a hybrid meeting and shareholders can join the meeting online or in person. The in-person meeting will take place at One Braham, 1 Braham Street, London  E1 8EE on Thursday 10 July 2025 at 2:00pm.  For more information, please refer to the Notice and our website bt.com/agm

The Annual Report and the Notice has been posted to those shareholders who have requested hard copy documentation.

For the purposes of complying with the FCA's Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules (DTRs) and the requirements imposed on issuers through the DTRs, the Annual Report, as submitted to the National Storage Mechanism, contains the following regulated information in unedited form:

·      The principal risks and uncertainties facing BT Group plc;

·      The Directors' responsibility statement made in respect of the financial statements and Directors' Report contained in the Annual Report; and

·      A statement regarding related party transactions.

- ENDS -

    Enquiries

Press office:

Richard Farnsworth

Tel: +44 7734 776 317

Jackie Bates

Tel:  +44 7496 691845

Investor relations:

Nick Delfas

Tel: 0800 389 4909

This information is provided by RNS, the news service of the London Stock Exchange. RNS is approved by the Financial Conduct Authority to act as a Primary Information Provider in the United Kingdom. Terms and conditions relating to the use and distribution of this information may apply. For further information, please contact rns@lseg.com or visit www.rns.com.

RNS may use your IP address to confirm compliance with the terms and conditions, to analyse how you engage with the information contained in this communication, and to share such analysis on an anonymised basis with others as part of our commercial services. For further information about how RNS and the London Stock Exchange use the personal data you provide us, please see our Privacy Policy.  END  ACSKLLBFEQLEBBF

data.title: DFDS Books Higher Freight Volumes in May; Passenger Traffic Falls
data.description:
DFDS said Thursday that freight volumes in May rose, while the number of passengers declined year over year.

The Danish shipping and logistics company's freight volume was 3.7 million lane meters, compared with 3.5 million lane meters a year ago.

Meanwhile, the number of passengers was 452,000, compared with 574,000 in the same month in the prior year.

data.title: Gold miners gain as rate-cut bets push bullion prices to one-week high
data.description:
** U.S.-listed shares of gold miners rise premarket, tracking higher bullion prices

** Spot gold rises 0.2% to $3,360.73/ounce, after hitting its highest level since June 5 earlier in the day

** Gold price rise driven by softer U.S. inflation data that strengthened expectations of Federal Reserve rate cuts this year, while investors look to another set of inflation data for further direction

** Top miners Newmont up 1.1% and Barrick Mining up marginally

** South African miners Gold Fields gains 3%, Harmony Gold up 2.2% and AngloGold Ashanti rises 3.1%

** Canadian miners Agnico Eagle Mines gains ~1% and Kinross Gold rises marginally

data.title: Arete Research Adjusts Price Target on NVIDIA to $200 From $194
data.description: NVIDIA has an average rating of buy and mean price target of $171.56, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Adjusts Price Target on Accenture to $340 From $372
data.description: Accenture has an average rating of overweight and mean price target of $354.80, according to analysts polled by FactSet.

data.title: Genius Sports Initiated at Buy by Texas Capital Securities
data.description: (09:55 GMT) Genius Sports Price Target Announced at $14.00/Share by Texas Capital Securities

data.title: Instalco Unit Lands Office Electrical, Telecom Installation Deal in Sweden
data.description:
Instalco's Ohmegi Elektro unit secured an electrical and telecom installation contract worth 50 million kronor, according to a Thursday release.

The Swedish installation services company's contract covers the 23,000-square-meter Olivin office building in Stockholm, Sweden, which will serve as Skanska's (SKA-B.ST) headquarters.

data.title: Trading Pause on 17 June 2025
data.description:
As the Company has previously informed during the Shareholder InformationMeeting which took place on 5 June 2025, the Company has agreed with OsloStockExchange to halt trading in the Company's shares on 17 June 2025 from thestartof trading until the earliest of either:

a). An announcement of the decision of Italian Supreme Court of Cassation isreceived by the Company and published via a stock exchange notice; or

b). The start of trading on 18 June 2025.

This decision has been made to prevent any possibility of trading based onunequal information in the market.

https://newsweb.oslobors.no/message/648953

data.title: Swedish Krona Hits 12-month High
data.description:
USDSEK decreased to a 12-month low of 9.47.

Over the past 4 weeks, US Dollar Swedish Krona lost 2.44%, and in the last 12 months, it decreased 9.65%.

data.title: Enviro's CEO and CFO subscribe to an additional approximately 9 million shares in Enviro's issue
data.description:
Scandinavian Enviro Systems (Enviro) CEO Fredrik Emilson and CFO Fredrik Aaben have subscribed to a total of 8,908,844 additional shares in Enviro's recently concluded rights issue. In total, they have now subscribed to nearly 13 million shares in the company's issue. The recently concluded rights issue strengthens Enviro's cash position with a total of SEK 240 million before issuing costs.

The issue secures Enviro's operations for the next 18 months, financing the company beyond the completion of the recycling plant in Uddevalla, through the start of operations, and on to the handover of the plant to the joint venture company Infiniteria, which takes place in mid-2026 when the plant is expected to receive the Provisional Acceptance Certificate (PAC). At PAC, Enviro's technology will have proven to work in a full-scale plant, which is a crucial milestone in the ongoing European rollout towards 1 million tons of annual recycling capacity. The Uddevalla plant will at this stage have the capacity to recycle 34,500 tons of end-of-life tires per year, and all its upcoming production of recycled tire oil, pyrolysis oil, and carbon black (rCB) is already sold out.

Ahead of the rights issue, Enviro's CEO Fredrik Emilson and CFO Fredrik Aaben entered subscription and guarantee commitments. These commitments are reflected in the subscription actions now carried out. Other members of the company's management have also subscribed to a significant number of shares in connection with the issue.

"The management's commitments and subscriptions reflect the strong confidence we all have in the company, its technology, and its ability to both solve a major environmental problem and simultaneously create significant economic value," says Fredrik Emilson, CEO of Enviro.

data.title: O2 Czech Republic Launches Nokia's 5G Standalone Core in Czech Republic
data.description:
Nokia said Thursday that O2 Czech Republic deployed its 5G Standalone Core software, becoming the first operator to roll out the advanced network infrastructure in the Czech Republic.

According to the Finnish telecommunications company, the deployment will enable the telco to offer better services with efficient mobile battery performance and scale securely.

data.title: Zhaoke Ophthalmology's License Application for Wet Macular Degeneration Drug Accepted in China
data.description:
Zhaoke Ophthalmology biologics license application for TAB014 was accepted by China's National Medical Products Administration for the treatment of wet age-related macular degeneration, a Thursday Hong Kong bourse filing said.

A phase III clinical trial of the product successfully met its primary and key secondary endpoints, as announced in January.

data.description:
EAM Solar secured Euronext Oslo Børs' clearance to trade on Euronext Growth Oslo, according to a Thursday release.

The Norway-based solar power plants investor will begin trading on the bourse no later than Sept. 2.

data.title: U.S. Crude Oil Stocks Fall 3.7 Million Barrels in Week Ended June 6, EIA Reports
data.description:
U.S. crude oil inventories declined by 3.7 million barrels to 432.4 million barrels in the week ended June 6, the U.S. Energy Information Administration said in its This Week in Petroleum report released on Wednesday.

Analysts polled by Reuters had expected a decline of 2 million barrels.

Meanwhile, crude oil production rose by 10,000 barrels per day to 13.41 million b/d, the EIA reported.

Crude oil imports increased by 83,000 b/d to 6.24 million b/d while crude oil exports fell 21,000 b/d to 3.75 million b/d, according to the agency.

Gasoline stocks gained 1.5 million barrels to 229.8 million barrels, the EIA said. Distillate stockpiles also rose 1.3 million barrels to 108.9 million barrels.
